title: Enel Crushes the Resistance
description: The Straw Hats and their allies try to survive Enel’s destruction while searching for a way to reach him.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this scene centers on Luffy, Nola, Nico Robin, Nami, Aisa. The Straw Hats and their allies try to survive Enel’s destruction while searching for a way to reach him.

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: And the people living here stole it.

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: That's right, upper yard is our Homeland...

summary: The Straw Hats and their allies try to survive Enel’s destruction while searching for a way to reach him.
